search.query: `meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | table id, name

`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | rename api.enabled as "API enabled", id as "Organization ID", url as "URL", name as "Organization Name" | table "Organization ID", "Organization Name", "URL" , "API enabled"

drilldown.link: search?q=`meraki_index` sourcetype="meraki:organizations" | dedup id | search api.enabled="$row.API enabled$" id="$row.Organization ID$" url="$row.URL$" name="$row.Organization Name$"&earliest=$time.earliest$&latest=$time.latest$
